assertions.title: GET /api/orgs returns only orgs where user is a member

commands: curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/orgs -H Content-Type: application/json -H Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN_A> --data {"name": "fdn_authz_core_org_1776385356e2yp"}
curl -sS -X GET http://localhost:3001/api/orgs -H Content-Type: application/json -H Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN_B>

assertions.title: Org update restricted to owner only

steps.observed: HTTP 403 (error=Only the owner can update the organization)

commands: curl -sS -X PATCH http://localhost:3001/api/orgs/69e17d4dbee9dfbd178c6710 -H Content-Type: application/json -H Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN_A> --data {"name": "fdn_authz_core_org_updated_1776385356e2yp"}

curl -sS -X PATCH http://localhost:3001/api/orgs/69e17d4dbee9dfbd178c6710 -H Content-Type: application/json -H Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN_B> --data {"name": "fdn_authz_core_org_updated_1776385356e2yp_by_b"}
payloadDetails: error=Only the owner can update the organization
